message:
refactor(build): add helper functions for test executables

Add reusable helper functions to reduce boilerplate when adding test
and benchmark executables:

- TestExeConfig struct for configurable test setup
- addMetalTestExe() for standard Metal-linked test executables
- addTestExeWithConfig() for custom configurations
- addTestStep() for creating run steps with optional args

Usage example:
  const exe = addMetalTestExe(b, target, optimize, "test-foo", "src/test_foo.zig");
  addTestStep(b, exe, "test-foo", "Description", true);

This reduces ~20 lines per test to ~2 lines for new tests.
